title: begonia × globosa
intro: Begonia × globosa, also known as Begonia x hybrida, is a hybrid plant species within the Begonia genus. It is a type of flowering plant that is commonly cultivated for its attractive blooms and ornamental value. The Begonia × globosa plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in China, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
